title: GlossModelWindow
description:
GlossModelWindow

Model Window

The Correlation objects require models (or templates) for proper execution.  These models are the idealized representation of a feature, stored as a pattern of grey levels, and which contain other data such as model size and contrast. The Model Window is used to define the size of the model. The user can set the size of the Model Window by dragging on any one of the Model Window sides.  The Model Window position can be set by clicking on the Model Window and dragging the Model Window with the mouse to a new location.  The Model Window is easily distinguishable from the Search Window

because it is blue in color at design time (vs. the yellow color of the search window) and it always fits inside the search window.
